title: phaius stenocentron
intro: Phaius stenocentron, also known as the Chinese orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Phaius stenocentron is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, and can be found in traditional Chinese medicine and Southeast Asian herbal remedies.
